asset.title: Ask Spreadsheet Cas
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview demonstrates an agent updating a spreadsheet and interacting in chat, but the rapid playback speed makes it difficult to follow the details.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows agent spreadsheet updates and chat, but the dense UI makes the exact flow hard to parse quickly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the before, action, and result states, though the transitions occur very rapidly.

visualDesign.evidence: Well-structured dark mode UI, but extremely dense with multiple competing focal points.

consistency.evidence: Successfully integrates the spreadsheet, chat, private agent, and trace panels.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic product capture showing real-time UI updates and console traces.

legibility.evidence: Text in the chat and trace panels is quite small and hard to read at standard preview sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant to financial analysts managing spreadsheet-based variance analysis.

productionHonesty.evidence: Shows realistic agent latency, thinking states, and detailed trace logs.

observedEvidence: Interactive spreadsheet panel with updating cells
Public chat panel with user and agent messages
Room trace panel showing agent execution steps
Private agent panel with status updates

defects.observed: The transition between agent actions and spreadsheet updates is too fast to read the text comfortably.
defects.fix: Slow down the GIF frame rate or add pauses at key states to allow the viewer to read the chat and spreadsheet cells.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeAgent automatically reconcile Q3 variances, update the shared spreadsheet, and log its execution trace in real-time.
